title: rhinacanthus calcaratus
intro: Rhinacanthus calcaratus, also known as "Bhairav", is a plant species in the family Acanthaceae, native to India and Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Rhinacanthus calcaratus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide protection against certain diseases. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in Ayurvedic medicine to create various preparations, such as powders and decoctions, for medicinal purposes.
